verses.text: They set up the tabernacle at Shiloh. Shiloh. Worship is centred.
Seven tribes have not yet received their land. Delay. They are slow to possess.
Seven tribes have not yet received their land. Delay. They are slow to possess.
Seven tribes have not yet received their land. Delay. They are slow to possess.
Joshua sends men to survey and divide the land. Survey. The land is mapped.
Joshua sends men to survey and divide the land. Survey. The land is mapped.
Joshua sends men to survey and divide the land. Survey. The land is mapped.
The men describe it; Joshua casts lots at Shiloh. Lots. God decides each portion.
The men describe it; Joshua casts lots at Shiloh. Lots. God decides each portion.

Benjamin's border is described. Benjamin. Their bounds are set.

Benjamin's cities are named. Cities. The tribe's portion is recorded.
